name: OpenMark AI Router
description: Benchmark-driven model routing. Routes tasks to optimal models using real evaluation data from OpenMark AI — accuracy, cost, latency, stability.

classifier_model.description: Override: model for classification calls. Leave empty to use your default model.

no_route_passthrough.description: Override: model for unrouted messages. Leave empty to use your default model.

port.description: Port for the embedded routing server

gateway_port.description: Port of the OpenClaw gateway (used for classification loopback). Default is 18789.

show_routing_card.description: Prepend routing card to responses when a task is routed

restore_delay_s.description: Seconds before auto-restoring openmark/auto as default model after routing
